Display.multi_display: Supports up to 4 independent displays (depending on processor platform)

memory.slots: Lunar Lake: memory soldered to systemboard, no slots; others: two DDR5 SO-DIMM slots
memory.features: Lunar Lake memory soldered, dual-channel; others dual-channel capable with two SODIMM slots; 64GB DDR5 support

storage.ssd_pcie: PCIe NVMe, PCIe 4.0 x4, up to 8GB/s, One slots for Lunar Lake Model and Two slots for others.

Bluetooth.form: Integrated in Wi-Fi + Bluetooth combo adapter
Bluetooth.feature: Bluetooth 5.2, 5.3, or 5.4 depending on WLAN card

camera: 5.0MP, with privacy shutter, fixed focus, temporal noise reduction
FHD 1080p + IR hybrid, with privacy shutter, fixed focus, temporal noise reduction
HD 720p, with privacy shutter, fixed focus
audio: HD Audio, Senary SN6147 codec / stereo speakers, 2W x2, Dolby Atmos, audio by HARMAN / dual- microphone array, far-field, smart noise-cancelling
keyboard: 6-row, spill-resistant, multimedia Fn keys, Copilot key, key travel 1.5mm/1.35mm, optional LED backlight
TrackPoint pointing device, double-tap to open TrackPoint Quick Menu, Mylar surface multi-touch 3-button trackpad, 60 x 115 mm

physical.dimensions: 313 x 220.3 x (10.1-20.5) mm (depending on cover material)
physical.weight: Starting at 1.32 kg (Lunar Lake) or 1.34 kg (others)

security: Discrete TPM 2.0, TCG certified, FIPS 140-3 certified
Certificate-based BIOS authentication, FIDO authentication, self-healing BIOS
Touch style fingerprint reader integrated in power button (optional)
add_on_tips: The heatsink for the Lunar Lake version is not interchangeable with those of other models.
Selected models sold in mainland China feature a better dual-heat-pipe cooling solution and more robust power delivery, allowing them to achieve up to 40W.
secret_tips: ARL版机器供电是出全了的，可以直接换双热管风扇。
这可能是ThinkPad有史以来涵盖平台最丰富的产品了
